name: io.github.Lykhoyda/ask-ollama
description: Bridge Claude with local Ollama LLMs for private AI-to-AI collaboration — no API keys, fully local

environmentVariables.name: GMCPT_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Timeout for Ollama execution in milliseconds (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)

environmentVariables.name: GMCPT_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error (default: warn)
